have exist_b (l : List String) : ∃ b, l.length = b.length ∧ (∀ x y, (x, y) ∈ l.zip b → ¬ ε.contains (x, y)) ∧ b.Nodup := by
    induction l with
    | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, by simp⟩
    | cons x xs ih =>
      obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
      let keys := ε.toList.map Prod.fst
      let bad := keys.filterMap (λ k => if k.1 = x then some k.2 else none)
      let avoid := bad ++ bs
      let max_len := avoid.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0
      let y := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
      have y_fresh : y ∉ avoid := by
        intro h
        have le : y.length ≤ max_len := by
          have h_all : ∀ s ∈ avoid, s.length ≤ max_len := by
            intro s hs; induction avoid with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons h t ih' => cases hs; subst h; simp [List.foldr]; apply Nat.le_max_left; simp [List.foldr]; apply Nat.le_trans (ih' (by assumption)) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
          exact h_all y h
        have lt : max_len < y.length := by simp [y, Nat.lt_succ_self]
        linarith
      refine ⟨y :: bs, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
      · intro u v huv
        simp at huv
        cases huv with
        | inl heq =>
          obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := heq
          have : (x, y) ∉ keys := by
            intro h
            have : y ∈ bad := by simp [bad, List.mem_filterMap]; exists (x, y); simp [h]
            have : y ∈ avoid := List.mem_append_left _ this
            contradiction
          cases ε with | mk l =>
          simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Batteries.AssocList.find?]
          intro h
          rw [Option.isSome_iff_exists] at h
          obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := h
          have pin : p ∈ l := List.mem_of_find?_eq_some hp
          have peq : p.1 = (x, y) := by
             have := List.find?_some hp
             simp at this
             exact this.2
          rw [←peq] at this
          simp [keys, Batteries.AssocList.toList] at this
          exact this pin
        | inr hin => apply hfresh _ _ hin
      · simp; exact ⟨λ h => y_fresh (List.mem_append_right _ h), hnodup⟩
  obtain ⟨b, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := exist_b a
  refine ⟨b, hlen, hfresh, ?_⟩
  rw [←List.map_snd_zip _ _ (by rw [hlen])]
  apply List.Nodup.of_map Prod.snd
  rw [List.map_snd_zip _ _ (by rw [hlen])]
  exact hnodup

          | inr e => trans (xs.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0); apply ih e; apply Nat.le_max_right

      rw [this] at this_1; apply Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this_1
    refine ⟨bh :: bt, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro u v hin
      simp at hin; cases hin with
      | inl e =>
        rcases e with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
        intro hc
        have : (h, bh) ∈ keys := by
          induction ε with
          | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc
          | cons k v l ih =>
            simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Batteries.AssocList.find?] at hc
            split at hc
            · simp [keys, Batteries.AssocList.toList]; left; apply eq_of_beq; assumption
            · simp [keys, Batteries.AssocList.toList]; right; exact ih hc
        have : bh ∈ bad := by simp [bad]; exists (h, bh); simp [this]
        contradiction
      | inr e => exact hfresh u v e
    · rw [List.nodup_cons]; constructor
      · intro hin
        have : bh ∈ bad := by simp [bad]; exists (h, bh); simp [hin]; right; assumption
        contradiction
      · exact hnodup

let bad := ε.toList.map (Prod.snd ∘ Prod.fst)
  let gen_fresh (l : List String) : String := (l.foldr String.append "") ++ "a"
  have fresh_prop : ∀ l, gen_fresh l ∉ l := by
    intro l h
    let sum_len := (l.map String.length).sum
    have le_sum : ∀ s ∈ l, s.length ≤ sum_len := by
      intro s hs; induction l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons x xs ih =>
        cases hs with
        | head h => subst h; apply Nat.le_add_right
        | tail _ h => apply Nat.le_trans (ih h); apply Nat.le_add_left
    have : (gen_fresh l).length = sum_len + 1 := by
      dsimp [gen_fresh]; rw [String.length_append]
      have : (l.foldr String.append "").length = sum_len := by
        induction l <;> simp [*, String.length_append]
      rw [this]; rfl
    have : (gen_fresh l).length ≤ sum_len := le_sum _ h
    omega
  have exists_b : ∃ b : List String, b.length = a.length ∧ b.Nodup ∧ ∀ x ∈ b, x ∉ bad := by
    induction a.length with
    | zero => exists []; simp
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨b', hl, hn, hd⟩ := ih
      let s := gen_fresh (bad ++ b')
      exists s :: b'; simp [hl, hn]
      constructor
      · intro h; apply fresh_prop (bad ++ b'); rw [List.mem_append]; right; assumption
      · intro x hx; cases hx with
        | head => intro h; apply fresh_prop (bad ++ b'); rw [List.mem_append]; left; assumption
        | tail _ h => apply hd _ h
  obtain ⟨b, hlen, hnodup, hdisj⟩ := exists_b
  refine ⟨b, hlen, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro a' b' h
    have : b' ∈ b := by
      have : b' ∈ (a.zip b).map Prod.snd := List.mem_map_of_mem _ h
      have map_snd : ∀ {l r : List String}, l.length = r.length → (l.zip r).map Prod.snd = r := by
        intro l; induction l with
        | nil => intro r h; cases r; rfl; contradiction
        | cons x xs ih => intro r h; cases r; contradiction; simp; apply ih; injections at h; assumption
      rwa [map_snd hlen] at this
    have : b' ∉ bad := hdisj _ this
    intro hc
    dsimp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc
    let ⟨_, hv⟩ := Option.isSome_iff_exists.mp hc
    rw [Batteries.AssocList.find?_eq_some_iff_mem_toList] at hv
    apply this; apply List.mem_map_of_mem (Prod.snd ∘ Prod.fst)
    apply List.mem_map_of_mem _ hv
  · rw [← hlen] at hnodup
    apply List.Nodup.of_map (f := Prod.snd)
    have map_snd : (a.zip b).map Prod.snd = b := by
      clear hdisj fresh_prop hnodup
      revert b; induction a <;> intro b h
      · cases b; rfl; contradiction
      · cases b; contradiction; simp; apply ih; injections at h; assumption
    rwa [map_snd]

induction a with
  | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, by simp⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨b, hl, hf, hn⟩ := ih
    let used := b ++ ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2)
    let max_len := used.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0
    let s := "".pushn 'a' (max_len + 1)
    have s_fresh : s ∉ used := by
      intro m
      have : s.length ≤ max_len := by
        induction used with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          simp [List.foldr] at *; cases m with
          | head => exact Nat.le_max_left _ _
          | tail m => exact Nat.le_trans (ih m) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      simp [s] at this; exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this
    refine ⟨s :: b, by simp [hl], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b' H; simp at H; cases H with
      | inl e =>
        cases e; simp only [Bool.not_eq_true]
        intro hc
        have : ∃ v, ((h, s), v) ∈ ε.toList := by
          suffices ∀ {l : FinEnv Ident (String × String)}, l.contains (h, s) → ∃ v, ((h, s), v) ∈ l.toList from this hc
          intro l hl; induction l with
          | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hl
          | cons k v tl ihl =>
            simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Batteries.AssocList.toList] at *
            cases heq : (k == (h, s))
            · rw [heq] at hl; simp [false_or] at hl; obtain ⟨v', hv'⟩ := ihl hl
              exact ⟨v', List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hv'⟩
            · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq; exact ⟨v, List.mem_cons_self _ _⟩
        obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := this
        exact s_fresh (List.mem_append_of_mem_right _ (List.mem_map_of_mem _ hv))
      | inr m => exact hf _ _ m
    · simp; constructor
      · intro m; exact s_fresh (List.mem_append_of_mem_left _ (List.mem_map_of_mem _ m))
      · exact hn

let bad := ε.toList.map (λ x => x.1.2)
  have exists_b : ∃ b : List String, b.length = a.length ∧ b.Nodup ∧ ∀ x ∈ b, x ∉ bad := by
    generalize hn : a.length = n
    induction n with
    | zero => exists []
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨b, hlen, hnodup, hbad⟩ := ih
      let used := b ++ bad
      let max_len := used.foldr (λ s n => Nat.max s.length n) 0
      let fresh := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
      have h_fresh : fresh ∉ used := by
        intro h
        have : fresh.length ≤ max_len := by
          induction used with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons s ss ih' =>
            cases h with
            | head => exact Nat.le_max_left _ _
            | tail _ h => exact Nat.le_trans (ih' h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
        have : fresh.length = max_len + 1 := rfl
        rw [this] at *
        have c : max_len + 1 > max_len := Nat.lt_succ_self _
        exact Nat.not_le_of_gt c this
      refine ⟨fresh :: b, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [List.nodup_cons]
        exact ⟨fun h => h_fresh (List.mem_append_of_mem_left _ h), hnodup⟩
      · intro x hx
        cases hx with
        | head => exact fun h => h_fresh (List.mem_append_of_mem_right _ h)
        | tail _ h => exact hbad x h

  obtain ⟨b, hlen, hnodup, hbad⟩ := exists_b
  exists b
  refine ⟨hlen, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro u v hin
    have vinb : v ∈ b := by
      have : length a = length b := hlen
      induction a generalizing b with
      | nil => cases b; contradiction; contradiction
      | cons x xs ih =>
        cases b with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons y ys =>
          simp at hin
          cases hin with
          | inl e => rw [e]; apply List.Mem.head
          | inr e => apply List.Mem.tail; apply ih; simp at this; exact this; exact e
    intro h
    replace h : (ε.find? (u, v)).isSome := by
      try rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_isSome] at h
      exact h
    match heq : ε.find? (u, v) with
    | some val =>
      have : (u, v) ∈ ε.toList.map Prod.fst := by
        -- Assuming minimal API; find? finds => in toList
        induction ε.toList with
        | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.find?] at heq; contradiction
        | cons k t ih' =>
          simp [Batteries.AssocList.find?] at heq
          split at heq
          · simp; left; assumption
          · simp; right; exact ih' heq
      have : v ∈ bad := by
        rw [List.mem_map] at this
        obtain ⟨key, hk1, hk2⟩ := this
        exists (key, val)
        exact ⟨hk1, by simp [hk2]⟩
      exact hbad v vinb this
    | none => simp at h
  · clear hbad
    induction a generalizing b with
    | nil => cases b; simp; contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      cases b with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons y ys =>
        simp
        simp at hlen
        obtain ⟨ny, nys⟩ := List.nodup_cons.mp hnodup
        constructor
        · intro h
          have : y ∈ ys := by
            -- prove y ∈ ys if (x,y) ∈ zip xs ys
            clear ih
            induction xs generalizing ys with
            | nil => cases ys; contradiction; contradiction
            | cons a as ih2 =>
              cases ys with
              | nil => contradiction
              | cons b bs =>
                simp at h
                cases h with
                | inl e => rw [e]; apply List.Mem.head
                | inr e => apply List.Mem.tail; apply ih2; simp at hlen; exact hlen; exact e
          exact ny this
        · exact ih ys hlen nys

induction a with
  | nil =>
    exists []
    simp
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let forbidden := bt ++ (ε.toList.filterMap (λ ⟨(k1, k2), _⟩ => if k1 == h then some k2 else none))
    let max_len := forbidden.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0
    let b_new := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
    have b_len : b_new.length = max_len + 1 := by simp
    have b_not_mem : b_new ∉ forbidden := by
      intro h
      have : b_new.length ≤ max_len := by
        clear hfresh hnodup b_len b_new hlen ih
        induction forbidden with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          simp [max_len] at *
          cases h with
          | head => apply Nat.le_max_left
          | tail _ h => apply Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      rw [b_len] at this
      simp at this
    exists (b_new :: bt)
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [hlen]
    · intro a' b' hin
      simp at hin
      cases hin with
      | inl heq =>
        obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := heq
        dsimp [Batteries.AssocList.contains]
        rw [Option.isSome_iff_exists]
        intro ⟨v, hv⟩
        have : b_new ∈ forbidden := by
           apply List.mem_append_of_mem_right
           rw [List.mem_filterMap]
           exists ⟨(h, b_new), v⟩
           constructor
           · apply Batteries.AssocList.find?_some_iff_mem_toList.mp hv
           · simp
        contradiction
      | inr hin => exact hfresh a' b' hin
    · rw [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons]
      constructor
      · intro hmem
        rw [List.mem_zip] at hmem
        rcases hmem with ⟨i, hi, h_get_a, h_get_b⟩
        have : b_new ∈ bt := List.mem_of_get? h_get_b
        exact b_not_mem (List.mem_append_of_mem_left _ this)
      · exact hnodup

induction a with
  | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, by simp⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let used := (xs.zip bs).filterMap (λ (u, v) => if u = x then some v else none) ++
                ε.toList.filterMap (λ ⟨(u, v), _⟩ => if u = x then some v else none)
    let max_len := used.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
    have s_len : s.length = max_len + 1 := by simp [s]
    have s_notin : s ∉ used := by
      intro h
      let rec le_max (l : List String) (y : String) (acc : Nat) (hm : y ∈ l) :
        y.length ≤ l.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) acc := by
        match l with
        | [] => contradiction
        | z :: zs =>
          simp [List.foldr]
          cases hm with
          | head => apply Nat.le_max_left
          | tail _ h' => apply Nat.le_trans (le_max zs y acc h') (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      have := le_max used s 0 h
      rw [s_len] at this
      apply Nat.not_succ_le_self max_len this
    refine ⟨s :: bs, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [hlen]
    · intro u v huv
      simp at huv
      rcases huv with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
      · rw [Bool.not_eq_true]
        by_contra hc
        apply s_notin
        apply List.mem_append_right
        rw [List.mem_filterMap]
        simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, List.any_eq_true] at hc
        rcases hc with ⟨⟨k, val⟩, hmem, heq⟩
        simp at heq; subst heq
        exact ⟨⟨(x, s), val⟩, hmem, rfl⟩
      · exact hfresh u v h
    · simp
      constructor
      · intro h
        apply s_notin
        apply List.mem_append_left
        rw [List.mem_filterMap]
        exact ⟨(x, s), h, rfl⟩
      · exact hnodup

induction a with
  | nil =>
    exists []
    simp [List.nodup_nil]
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hl, hf, hn⟩ := ih
    let forbidden := bt ++ (ε.toList.map (λ k => k.1.2))
    let lens := forbidden.map String.length
    let max_len := lens.foldr max 0
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
    have s_len : s.length = max_len + 1 := by simp [s, List.length_replicate]
    have s_fresh : s ∉ forbidden := by
      intro hin
      have : s.length ≤ max_len := by
        let rec le_max_of_mem {x : Nat} {l : List Nat} (h : x ∈ l) : x ≤ l.foldr max 0 := by
          match l with
          | [] => contradiction
          | y :: ys =>
            simp [List.foldr]
            cases h with
            | head => exact Nat.le_max_left _ _
            | tail _ h' => exact Nat.le_trans (le_max_of_mem h') (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
        apply le_max_of_mem
        rw [List.mem_map]
        exists s
      rw [s_len] at this
      exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this
    exists s :: bt
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [hl]
    · intros a' b' hin
      simp at hin
      cases hin with
      | inl eq =>
        cases eq
        intro hcon
        have s_in_snd : s ∈ ε.toList.map (λ k => k.1.2) := by
          rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hcon
          have : (ε.find? (a', s)).isSome := hcon
          have ⟨v, hv⟩ := Option.isSome_iff_exists.mp this
          let rec find_implies_mem {α β} [DecidableEq α] (k : α) (l : Batteries.AssocList α β) (v : β) :
            l.find? k = some v → (k, v) ∈ l.toList := by
            cases l with
            | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.find?]
            | cons k' v' t =>
              simp [Batteries.AssocList.find?, Batteries.AssocList.toList]
              intro h
              split at h
              · simp_all; left; assumption
              · right; exact find_implies_mem k t v h
          have hmem := find_implies_mem _ _ _ hv
          apply List.mem_map_of_mem (λ x : (String × String) × TModule1 Ident => x.1.2) hmem
        have : s ∈ forbidden := List.mem_append_right _ s_in_snd
        contradiction
      | inr hin =>
        exact hf _ _ hin
    · simp [List.nodup_cons, hn]
      intro h_s_in_zip
      have : s ∈ bt := by
        let rec mem_of_zip {α β} {x : α} {y : β} {l1 : List α} {l2 : List β} :
          (x, y) ∈ l1.zip l2 → y ∈ l2 := by
          intro h
          cases l1 <;> cases l2
          · contradiction
          · contradiction
          · contradiction
          · simp at h; cases h with | inl e => cases e; simp | inr e => exact mem_of_zip e
        exact mem_of_zip h_s_in_zip
      have : s ∈ forbidden := List.mem_append_left _ this
      contradiction

induction a generalizing ε with
  | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, by simp⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let forbidden := (ε.toList.map Prod.fst ++ t.zip bt).filterMap (λ (x, y) => if x == h then some y else none)
    let len := forbidden.foldr (λ s n => s.length + n) 0
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (len + 1) 'x')
    have hnot : s ∉ forbidden := by
      intro hin
      have : s.length ≤ len := by
        induction forbidden with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons f fs ih =>
          simp [List.foldr]
          simp at hin
          cases hin with
          | inl heq => rw [heq]; apply Nat.le_add_right
          | inr hin => exact Nat.le_trans (ih hin) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      have : s.length = len + 1 := rfl
      rw [this] at this_1
      exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this_1
    refine ⟨s :: bt, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b' hin
      simp at hin
      cases hin with
      | inl heq =>
        simp [heq]
        intro hc
        apply hnot
        simp [forbidden]
        left
        clear hlen hfresh hnodup hnot
        induction ε with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons k v tail ih =>
          simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Batteries.AssocList.toList] at *
          split at hc
          · subst k; simp
          · right; apply ih hc
      | inr hin => exact hfresh _ _ hin
    · simp [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons, hnodup]
      intro hmem
      apply hnot
      simp [forbidden]
      right
      use s

induction a with
  | nil =>
    exists []
    simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let rec keys {α β} : Batteries.AssocList α β → List α
      | .nil => []
      | .cons k _ t => k :: keys t
    let rec maxLen : List String → Nat
      | [] => 0
      | s :: ss => Nat.max s.length (maxLen ss)
    let getFresh (l : List String) : String :=
      String.mk (List.replicate (maxLen l + 1) 'a')
    have length_le_maxLen : ∀ {s} {l : List String}, s ∈ l → s.length ≤ maxLen l := by
      intro s l h
      induction l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        cases h with
        | head => apply Nat.le_max_left
        | tail _ h => exact Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    have getFresh_not_mem : ∀ (l : List String), getFresh l ∉ l := by
      intro l h
      have := length_le_maxLen h
      have : (getFresh l).length = maxLen l + 1 := by simp [getFresh]
      rw [this] at length_le_maxLen
      have : maxLen l < maxLen l + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_self _
      have : ¬ (maxLen l + 1 ≤ maxLen l) := Nat.not_le_of_gt this
      contradiction

    let bad_ε := (keys ε).filterMap (λ (k, v) => if k == x then some v else none)
    let y := getFresh (bs ++ bad_ε)

    exists y :: bs
    constructor
    · simp [hlen]
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h
      simp at h
      cases h with
      | inl heq =>
        obtain ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
        subst ha hb
        intro hc
        have key_mem : ε.contains (x, y) → (x, y) ∈ keys ε := by
          intro hc
          induction ε with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons k v t ih' =>
            dsimp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc
            split at hc
            next heq =>
              simp [heq]
              exact List.Mem.head _
            next =>
              right; exact ih' hc
        have hky := key_mem hc
        have hy : y ∈ bad_ε := by
          have : (x, y) ∈ keys ε := hky
          let l := keys ε
          induction l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl ih_l =>
            cases this with
            | head =>
              subst hd
              dsimp [List.filterMap]
              simp
            | tail _ htl =>
              dsimp [List.filterMap]
              split
              · simp; right; exact ih_l htl
              · exact ih_l htl
        have : y ∉ bs ++ bad_ε := getFresh_not_mem _
        have : y ∉ bad_ε := by
          intro h
          apply this
          apply List.mem_append_of_mem_right
          exact h
        contradiction
      | inr hin =>
        exact hfresh _ _ hin
    · simp
      constructor
      · intro h
        have : y ∈ bs := by
          clear hlen hfresh hnodup bad_ε ih getFresh_not_mem length_le_maxLen maxLen getFresh keys
          induction xs generalizing bs with
          | nil => cases bs; contradiction; contradiction
          | cons x' xs' ih' =>
            cases bs with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons b' bs' =>
              simp at h
              cases h with
              | inl he => cases he; exact List.Mem.head _
              | inr hr => right; exact ih' hr
        have : y ∉ bs ++ bad_ε := getFresh_not_mem _
        have : y ∉ bs := by
          intro h
          apply this
          apply List.mem_append_of_mem_left
          exact h
        contradiction
      · exact hnodup

induction a with
  | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, by simp⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨b, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let env_strs := ε.toList.bind (λ p => [p.1.1, p.1.2])
    let forbidden := env_strs ++ b
    let max_len := forbidden.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (max_len + 1) 'a')
    have s_not_forbidden : s ∉ forbidden := by
      intro h
      have le_max : ∀ {x l}, x ∈ l → x.length ≤ l.foldr (λ s n => max s.length n) 0 := by
        intro x l h; induction l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons y ys ih =>
          simp [List.foldr] at *; cases h with
          | inl e => rw [e]; apply Nat.le_max_left
          | inr m => trans; exact ih m; apply Nat.le_max_right
      have := le_max h
      simp [s] at this
      exact Nat.not_le_of_gt (Nat.lt_succ_self max_len) this
    exists s :: b
    refine ⟨by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intros a' b' h; simp at h; cases h with
      | inl e =>
        rcases e with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
        simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_isSome, Option.isSome_iff_exists, Batteries.AssocList.find?]
        intro v hv
        have hin : ((h, s), v) ∈ ε.toList := List.find?_some hv
        have : s ∈ env_strs := by rw [List.mem_bind]; exists ((h, s), v); exact ⟨hin, by simp⟩
        exact s_not_forbidden (List.mem_append_left _ this)
      | inr m => exact hfresh _ _ m
    · simp [hnodup]; intro y hy eq; rw [←eq] at hy
      exact s_not_forbidden (List.mem_append_right _ hy)
